description: Reach out to interested prospects from the POG conference to offer connecting and learning more about how AI can help their business
Consider offering a targeted 1-hour workshop to interested prospects from the conference to discuss their specific AI ideas and opportunities
Create some evergreen resources (e.g. on Gumroad) based on the workshop content to capture leads and gauge interest in future workshops
Take learnings from this initial workshop to invest into creating a more structured learning experience (e.g. course) and capturing leads who want the course vs. a full solution
